summary: Verified the primary fix from iteration_1: custom-exercise modal save button now renders inside viewport (y=771, h=48, bottom=819 on 390x844) and tapping it successfully creates the custom exercise. Home loads cleanly with initial 0/0 stats. Completed partial end-to-end verification; preview-environment flakiness + one test-script f-string backslash issue prevented full single-run E2E for log-set/PR/chart/delete/lbs/clear flows. Code review of exercise/[id].tsx, settings.tsx, storage.ts confirms the remaining flows are implemented correctly (PR = Math.max(weights), toDisplay/fromDisplay conversions, deleteSet, clearAllData via multiRemove).

react_native_issues.issue: Console still emits 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — warning only, not crash. Worth confirming all usages migrated.

action_items: Main agent should self-verify these flows manually or via a fresh Playwright pass when preview is stable: (a) Log a set (reps=8, weight=60 kg) → PR badge shows 'PR: 60.0 kg', today-set-0 shows '8 × 60.0 kg'; (b) chart-mode-volume / chart-mode-max toggles; (c) delete today's set → PR badge disappears; (d) switch unit to lbs → WEIGHT (lbs) label, set renders ~132.3 lbs, PR ~132.3 lbs; (e) home TOTAL WORKOUTS increments to 1 and TODAY vol = reps*weight after logging; (f) clear-data-btn empties AsyncStorage.
Confirm no remaining pointerEvents prop in LineChart to eliminate deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: storage.ts computeStreak: the fallback block uses `while(true)` with an inner `if (streak===0)` that can mutate cursor twice — logic is reachable but fragile; consider unit-testing edge cases (no sets today, gaps).

exercise/[id].tsx: resolvedCat fallback for custom ids returns '' — categoryId on LoggedSet may be empty for custom exercises if `cat` param missing (currently cat is always passed from category screen, so OK).

success_rate.frontend: ~60% (FAB/modal/custom-exercise verified; other flows not fully executed end-to-end due to preview flakiness)

seed_data_creation: None (AsyncStorage cleared at start of each run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Default chest exercise ID is 'chest:Barbell Bench Press' (NOT 'chest:Bench Press'). Use page.locator('[data-testid^="delete-set-set:"]').first for the delete button (set id is dynamic). Preview URL can return 502 briefly — add retries. In Playwright scripts avoid backslashes inside f-string expressions (use a variable). The fix for iteration_1 (save button inside viewport, autoFocus removed, reduced padding) is CONFIRMED working.
rca_of_issue: iteration_1 save-btn-out-of-viewport RCA (already fixed): autoFocus on TextInput opened keyboard in web preview; combined with larger modal padding pushed primary button below 667px viewport. Removing autoFocus and reducing padding brings the save button to y~771 on 390x844 viewport, well inside the visible area.
